title: About

About this site
Hello! My name is Alondra Casas and I am a fourth year undergraduate marine science student at CSUMB in Dr. Canner’s STAT210 course. I’ve decided to take this class to strengthen my r skills and widen my knowledge.
This is my final eportfolio!

title: STAT 210 Final Eportfolio: Alondra Casas
text: This Quarto website is my final eportfolio!
